summary: Iteration 321: Bug fix verification for Herbology search (axios interceptor) and Breathing page footer. ALL TESTS PASSED. Herbology search for 'Ashwagandha' and 'Turmeric' works instantly without spinner stuck. Breathing 'Begin Breathwork' button is clickable and changes to 'Stop'. Compliance footer is compact (11px). All 10 content pages load correctly for guest users.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All bug fixes verified, all pages load correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) Herbology search works instantly - axios interceptor now uses deny-list approach, only gates user-specific endpoints for guests. (2) Breathing footer is compact at 11px. All content pages load for guests: /herbology (12 herbs), /breathing (5 patterns), /meditation, /oracle, /crystals, /light-therapy (7 colors, blend, resonance names), /hub (10 mixer tabs), /yoga (Hatha/Vinyasa/Kundalini), /star-chart, /numerology. Sage AI prompt-to-FX and Atmosphere Journal save/browse/re-apply all working.
